case_title: MINNIE LOO VS. RHINO CERAMIC COATING, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/07/2021 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LOO, MINNIE AS TO DEFENDANT RHINO CERAMIC COATING, INC. DBA RHINO SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA CALIFORNIA CERAMIC COATINGS DBA RHINO SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA OLSON, DELTON OWEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED JUL-18-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RHINO CERAMIC COATING, INC. DBA RHINO SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES TO NOV-20-2017 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA CERAMIC COATING DBA RHINO SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MINNIE LOO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT RHINO CERAMIC COATING, INC. DBA RHINO SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DELTON OLSON, SALES REPRESENTATIVE. DEFENDANT DELTON OLSON IS PRESENT ON HIS OWN BEHALF. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA CERAMIC COATING DBA RHINO SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY SEAN AYERS, PRESIDENT. THE THREE DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-20-2017 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
